This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] #1 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #5 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #6 Test that WebAssembly compilation succeeds (ref_as_non_null.wast:1)
  assert_true: WebAssembly.compile failed unexpectedly with TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt at {loc} expected true got false
[FAIL] #7 Test that WebAssembly instantiation succeeds
  assert_true: unexpected instantiation error, observed TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'source') \n    at instance (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:207:15)\n    at ref_as_non_null_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/ref_as_non_null.wast.js:7:10)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/ref_as_non_null.wast.js:30:3 expected true got false
[FAIL] #8 Test that a WebAssembly code traps (ref_as_non_null.wast:25)
  assert_true: expected runtime error, observed TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'unreachable') \n    at assert_trap (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:269:15)\n    at ref_as_non_null_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/ref_as_non_null.wast.js:10:1)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/ref_as_non_null.wast.js:30:3 expected true got false
